content_body: What a pick! Having not much clue about the area or this cabin, I think we picked a winner. Such a joy to get out into the mountains for Easter. The cabin made us feel at home immediately—so comfortable and well set out with a beautiful rustic feel. We enjoyed playing pool and working through the DVDs, and the hot tub view was incredible. Thanks for adding touches like modern appliances (eg. the ipod dock) and lots of kitchen goods to cook with. We did have an indoor Easter hunt, too—I think we found them all...sorry! :) We loved our time here and hope to return during our year in Florida. Thanks for helping us have a romantic weekend out of the city!
title: A Majestic Easter
